name: BEN_PL_TYP_F_VL
query: SELECT PLTYP.PL_TYP_ID, PLTYP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, PLTYP.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, NVL(TL.NAME, PLTYP.NAME) NAME, PLTYP.MX_ENRL_ALWD_NUM, PLTYP.MN_ENRL_RQD_NUM, PLTYP.PL_TYP_STAT_CD, PLTYP.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PLTYP.OPT_DSPLY_FMT_CD, PLTYP.COMP_TYP_CD, PLTYP.SHORT_CODE, PLTYP.SHORT_NAME, PLTYP.LEGISLATION_CODE, PLTYP.LEGISLATION_SUBGROUP, PLTYP.GLOBAL_FLAG, PLTYP.SS_CATEGORY_CD, PLTYP.ADMIN_CATEGORY_CD, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, PLTYP.PTP_ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, PLTYP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = TL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+) AND TL.LANGUAGE(+) = USERENV('LANG')
